description: Composition:Black round neck t-shirt made of  70% cotton and 30% viscose,with chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking 5. Remove promptly 6. Line dry inside-out in shade 7. Warm iron only 8. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Regular FitLet your cool attitude rub off on your gang this summer with this black round neck tee from mr.men. A great casual wear, this t-shirt wil look great with jeans when on nights out with friends.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-19"
